sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_matrix: Combinational FP32-to-signed-quantized conversion for flattened A and B matrices using Q15 scale and signed zero-points.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational signed integer GEMM over centered quantized operands with INT32 accumulators.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_matrix: Combinational dequantization from INT32 accumulators to packed IEEE-754 FP32 outputs using Q15 scale product.
